_notes: Required: query, results, images, response_time, answer. results[].score and results[].raw_content are optional.
answer: Transformers are a type of deep learning model architecture introduced in 2017 that rely on self-attention mechanisms.

results.title: Attention Is All You Need - Vaswani et al.
results.content: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks. We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms.

results.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers
results.content: We introduce BERT, a new language representation model designed to pre-train deep bidirectional representations from unlabeled text by jointly conditioning on both left and right context.
results.raw_content: BERT stands for Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers.

results.title: The Illustrated Transformer – Jay Alammar
results.content: A visual guide to the transformer architecture and how attention mechanisms work in modern NLP models.

results.title: Hugging Face Transformers Documentation
results.content: State-of-the-art machine learning library providing thousands of pretrained models to perform tasks on text, images, and audio.

results.title: Transformers: Explained | Google Cloud
results.content: Transformers are a type of neural network architecture that transforms or changes an input sequence into an output sequence.
